tracks.meaning: a storage location in a computer's memory or database used to hold data or values
a list or record of musical pieces, typically in a book or ledger
an official record or document, such as a register of births, deaths, or marriages
to enter or record something officially in a list or system
to convey or express an emotion or impression, especially visibly or noticeably
the range or compass of a voice or musical instrument
the exact alignment of printed colors or images on different layers or pages
a heat-control device, such as a damper in a furnace or ventilation system
a device or machine that records transactions and stores cash, typically in retail
to achieve recognition or make an impression on someone's awareness
